channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned bin for ~6 months, 26th March
item.description:
Green bin that has been abandoned for at least 6 months. It's full and it isn't being collected as it seems to contain mixed rubbish. It's typically located either on the road in front of 304-310 Well Hall Road, or in the pathway between these houses.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Hall Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass area in fromt of Market Meadow has been cut, but none of the litter was cleared before! Its now all shreaded and all over the grass and surrouncing area, please clear up this mess., 26th March
item.description:
Grass area in fromt of Market Meadow has been cut, but none of the litter was cleared before! Its now all shreaded and all over the grass and surrouncing area, please clear up this mess.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Market Meadow, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Salvation Army premises- on pavement, 26th March
item.description:
Sofas dumped outside our premises- blocking part of the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Broken glass, 26th March
item.description:
A window has been dumped on the pavement and the glass has been smashed, leaving lots of dangerous glass on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eden Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree covered in ivy needs pruning or cutting down in Abbey Woods, 26th March
item.description:
Large tree covered in ivy needs pruning or cutting down in Abbey Woods - it is blocking light into residents gardens etc - please can this be looked into
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Treetops Close, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked rainwater gulleys in Treetops Close near the Yukka Tree, 26th March
item.description:
Blocked rainwater gulleys in Treetops Close near the Yukka Tree - they gulleys are blocked with leaves from the tree - please can these be unblocked
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Treetops Close, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Ambulance, 26th March
item.description:
An abandoned ambulance has been left i n Halt robin Road for a while now full of rubbish please inspect and remove no tax
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Halt Robin Lane, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of weeds growing through the paving stones of the pavement whole way down Treetops Close, 26th March
item.description:
Lots of weeds growing through the paving stones of the pavement whole way down Treetops Close - there used to be a regular schedule where someone would come round and spray the weeds but that hasn't happened for a long time resident has said - please can this be looked into
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Treetops Close, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poorly swept pavement at the side of the Candy Box in Maple Crescent along the wall and near the steps leading to the flats over the shops., 26th March
item.description:
The area of Maple Crescent at the side of the Candy Box is an appalling mess. The debris including broken glass has just been swept up to the wall and not removed. Please rectify and sweep our road on a regular basis including the area I have just mentioned.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Maple Crescent, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter flying around everywhere causing hazards, due to bins not being collected, 26th March
item.description:
The inadequate facilities or use of waste disposal in the car park, to the rear of some shops and restaurants, as well as public bins which have failed to be collected for weeks on end. Rubbish and litter, small and large items are flying everywhere
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilmer Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheelie bins on footpath and not been emptied, 26th March
item.description:
Noticed these here yesterday as well as today (26th Mar) They have been pulled out of the storage area, and left on footpath, but not been emptied. Now, because of the windy weather, the rubbish is blowing everywhere. Please empty and clear rubbish from the area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birch Row, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More dog crap, 26th March
item.description:
Outside 96 Midhurst Hill, DA6 by the lamp post.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Midhurst Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo, 26th March
item.description:
On the pavement infront of 88 Midhurst Hill, DA6.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Midhurst Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Harbour Road street sign very faded; needs replacing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harbour Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London

item.title: Worn Street Sign, 26th March
item.description:
Cambria Road street sign very faded; needs replacing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 191 - 193, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London

item.title: Poor tarmac repair now broken up, 26th March
item.description:
Poor pavement repair reported previously (8900622) outside bungalow (56). No action was taken and to report if it gets worse. Tarmac has has now broken up as repair was laid on mud.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Boundary Road, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
